title: Verify Odds API daily/monthly budget enforcement with isolated proof states
objective: Prove daily cap, monthly soft throttle, monthly hard stop, and budget-file state behavior using safe non-production budget scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: all three budget modes are proven
dashboard remains independent of Odds API streaming
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Verification-only. Helper script/temp budget file can be removed if desired.
